title: senecio tristis
intro: Senecio tristis, also known as Blue Ray or Blue Ray Daisy, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to South Africa. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their purported medicinal properties, which include being a natural anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant. The health benefits of Senecio tristis include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as easing digestive problems and skin irritations. Senecio tristis can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, but caution should be exercised due to potential toxicity from the plant's pyrrolizidine alkaloids.
